ksa_text: Develop and enforce enterprise data management standards, requirements, and specifications across all data systems and operations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-004 (Data Governance) scores 0.456 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Context Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Governance KSA DG-T-004 as a discrete competency for Context Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Context Engineer.

decision_rationale: Data Governance is out of scope for Context Engineer.
